title: Tamil Nadu election 2026 LIVE: Record voting raises stakes in DMK-AIADMK battle, focus on results
description: Tamil Nadu election 2026 LIVE: Out of 5.73 crore eligible voters, around 4.87 crore exercised their franchise. Karur district recorded the highest turnout at 91.86 per cent, while Kanyakumari saw the lowest at 75.50 per cent.
